description: Drain animation for solid shapes. Reverse of fill3d — animates liquid draining from full to empty.
utility: Animate a drain effect inside a 3D solid

arguments.name: solidRef
arguments.description: Reference to solid shape to drain

examples.expression:
S = cylinder3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 2, 5, c(navy))
drain3d(S, fc(blue), fo(0.6))
